---
name: create-instructions
description: Describe when to use this prompt
agent: instructions-generator
---

take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a .md filename id=s provided,use that, otherwise generate an appropriate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long.Make sure to update theAGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file.If no information is provided below,prompt the user to give ths necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
